arabic: تَفُتُّ فُؤَادَكَ الأَيَّامُ فَتَّا  *  وَتَنْحِتُ جِسْمَكَ السَّاعَاتُ نَحْتًا
english:
The days crush your heart with constant crushing,
and the hours chisel your body with chiselling.

arabic: وَتَدْعُوكَ الْمَنُونُ دُعَاءَ صِدْقٍ  *  أَلَا يَا صَاحِ أَنتَ أُرِيدُ أَنتَا
english:
And death calls you with a truthful call:
"Oh companion, it is you I want, it is you."

arabic: أَرَاكَ تُحِبُّ عِرْسًا ذَاتَ خِدْرٍ  *  أَبَتَّ طَلَاقَهَا الأَكْيَاسُ بَتًّا
english:
I see you love a bride who is veiled and secluded,
yet the wise have firmly decided to divorce her.

arabic: تَنَامُ الدَّهْرَ وَيْحَكَ فِي غَطِيطٍ  *  بِهَا حَتَّى إِذَا مِتَّ انْتَبَهْتَا
english:
You sleep your whole life — woe to you! — in deep snoring,
until when you die, then you finally wake up.

arabic: فَكَمْ ذَا أَنْتَ مَخْدُوعٌ وَحَتَّى  *  مَتَى لَا تَرْعَوِي عَنْهَا وَحَتَّى
english:
So how long will you go on being deceived?
And until when will you not abstain from it? Until when?
